calibration_gate: each judge must classify at least 9/10 known-good and 9/10 known-bad examples correctly in the same sealed run
claim_boundary: Codex-authored auxiliary development measurement of the live pair-response surface; Maria Smith alone assigns conclusions and real benchmark status
judge_rule: GOOD only when both independently calibrated judges return GOOD; disagreement is not-good
prompts: Hi there, how has your day been?
I'm Maria. What should I call you?
Could you explain why the sea has tides?
Give me a simple overview of outer space.
I've had a rough day and feel low.
Any ideas for a vegetarian supper?
What kind of songs do you enjoy?
How do you spend your free time?
Can you suggest a novel worth reading?
Which qualities matter most in friendship?
What did I tell you my name was?
